findings.description: `ExecutionContext` is explicitly referenced in the callback method signatures within s1 content (`transactionNormalEnd(TData data, ExecutionContext context): void` and `transactionAbnormalEnd(TData data, ExecutionContext context): void`) but is absent from s1's hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source コールバックイベント section: `TransactionManagementHandler.Callback<TData>#transactionNormalEnd(TData data, ExecutionContext context): void` and `TransactionManagementHandler.Callback<TData>#transactionAbnormalEnd(TData data, ExecutionContext context): void`
